text.title: Team AI Usage Policy Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "policy_id": "ai-policy-acme", "version": "1.0.0", "owner": { "name": "L. Vasylenko", "role": "Head of Security", "slack": "#sec-ai-policy" }, "review_date": "2026-08-22", "lists": { "always_ok": [ "Open-source repos pasted to AI assistant", "Pasting OUR docs that are already public", "Asking for code review on YOUR own code", "Generating boilerplate (tests / migrations / docs)", "Asking conceptual questions" ], "never_ok": [ "Pasting customer PII into any AI tool", "Pasting payment / health / minor data", "Sharing prod credentials", "Pasting unredacted security incidents", "Pasting unredacted internal financial data" ], "ask_first": [ "Pasting competitor product details", "Pasting unannounced product roadmap items", "Using tools not on the approved list" ] }, "incident_response": { "detect": "Self-report or auto-detector triggers IR ticket", "contain": "Rotate any leaked secret in 30 min", "notify": "Security lead in 1h; DPO if PII", "learn": "Postmortem within 5 working days; policy updated" }, "word_count": 410 }

example.note: Missing owner, review_date, lists, incident_response; version not semver.
